summary: Enable plug-and-play compute contributions with receipts and onboarding instructions.

steps.title: Design contributor flow and receipt schema
Implement CLI + automation to run workloads and capture receipts
steps.notes: Added teof up --contribute with receipt logging and contributor doc updates.

steps.title: Update onboarding/docs to invite contributors
steps.notes: README + onboarding docs reference teof up --contribute and example receipts.

checkpoint.description: Contributors can run one command, produce receipts in _report/usage/contributors/, and docs explain how to donate compute.
